name: Sylvan Cherubsprout
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>芽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> スプラウト
desc: When this card is Special Summoned: You can choose either 1 or 2, then excavate that many cards from the top of your Deck, send any excavated Plant-Type monsters to the Graveyard, also place the other cards on the bottom of your Deck in any order. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 Plant-Type monster from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Sylvan Cherubsprout" once per turn.

If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 Plant-Type monster from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Sylvan Cherubsprout" once per turn.

sets.set: Legacy of the Valiant: Deluxe Edition

action: Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
